task: Check the status of bus S92 for any disruptions on new.mta.info.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by checking official MTA sources and determining the S92 bus had no active disruptions. Although the website UI path was problematic (bus finder did not surface results, route/status pages returned 404 or redirect loops), the agent found and queried the official MTA bus alerts JSON feed exposed by MTA's developer resources. Evidence shows the feed returned 128 current alert entities and a direct search for S92 found zero matches ([17], [39]). The agent also verified from Staten Island GTFS that the official route_id for S92 is exactly `S92` ([41]), so the zero-match result is meaningful. Under the judging principles, website limitations are not agent failures, and using an official MTA feed with evidence-backed extraction satisfies the task intent of checking for disruptions.
final_result_response:
I checked MTA’s Bus service status and the official MTA Bus Alerts feed.

Result: No active S92 disruptions found. The live bus alerts feed had 128 current alert entities, and none matched route `S92`. MTA describes these feeds as including “current and future service alerts for all modes.” <citation refs="search_a33b6888db7f451d914bd3b19b22d890#2">“current and future service alerts for all modes”</citation>

Checked at about 4:04 PM Pacific / 7:04 PM Eastern.
action_history: Opening MTA site: const p1 = await openTab('https://new.mta.info/');
Checking bus status tab: await page.locator('e22').click();
Searching for S92 bus route: await page.locator('e73').fill('S92');
Submitting S92 route search: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Opening MTA bus service status page: const pStatus1 = await openTab('https://new.mta.info/service-status/bus');
Opening S92 route page: const pRoute1 = await openTab('https://new.mta.info/schedules/bus/S92');
Trying bus finder selection keys: await page.keyboard.press('Control+A');
Trying bus finder selection keys: await page.keyboard.type('S92');
Trying bus finder selection keys: await page.keyboard.press('ArrowDown');
Trying bus finder selection keys: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
